## Takeaway

# Three results, one mechanism — bandwidth, not compute

- **Result 1**: 3.2× speedup → memory subsystem
- **Result 2**: 2.7× speedup → identical bandwidth bottleneck
- **Result 3**: regression on small workloads → fixed cost
- See preprint for the full ablation matrix
